item.title: Bear Stewart Co: Bakr Brown Butter Chocolate Chunk Ready to Bake Cookie Dough, 8-oz pouch 12 cookies per pouch, Recall
item.product: Bakr Brown Butter Chocolate Chunk Ready to Bake Cookie Dough, 8-oz pouch 12 cookies per pouch,
item.summary: undeclared soy Product details: Bakr Brown Butter Chocolate Chunk Ready to Bake Cookie Dough, 8-oz pouch 12 cookies per pouch, UPC 8 50073 08700 8, 8 pouches per case
item.affectedPeople: The recalled Bakr Brown Butter Chocolate Chunk Ready To Bake Cookie Dough was distributed in Southern California, Southern Nevada, Arizona, and Utah through Target retail stores starting on June 11, 2026.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
